message:
fix(service): thread-local test time, steer fail-closed on panic, hedge cleanup

Hedge (hedge.rs):
  Migrated TEST_NOW from static AtomicU64 to thread_local Cell<u64>.
  This eliminates cross-test interference when tests run in parallel
  on the same process. All TEST_NOW.store() calls replaced with
  set_test_time(). TEST_NOW.load() replaced with thread_local access
  via Cell::get. The thread_local uses const initialization for zero
  overhead.

Rate limiter (rate_limit.rs):
  Same AtomicU64 → thread_local Cell<u64> migration as hedge. Added
  set_test_time() helper. All test sites updated.

Timeout (timeout.rs):
  Same migration. All tests updated to use set_test_time().

Steer (steer.rs):
  The Calling state previously used an if/else on is_pending(), which
  left the state as Done when the inner future panicked (since the
  state transition happened before the panic could propagate). After
  the panic unwound, subsequent polls would see Done and return
  PolledAfterCompletion — correct behavior but by accident.

  Refactored to an explicit match on Poll variants. On Pending, the
  future is moved back into SteerState::Calling. On Ready(Ok/Err),
  state transitions to Done. On panic, the state remains Calling with
  an invalid future, but the panic propagates before any return.

  This is semantically cleaner and the fail-closed behavior is now
  tested explicitly:
  - PanicOnPollService/PanicOnPollFuture test helpers
  - steer_future_inner_panic_fails_closed: verifies panic propagates
    and subsequent poll returns PolledAfterCompletion

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
